description_long: This helmet is a robust, vintage-style space or aviation helmet with a hard, rounded shell finished in off-white. The front features a large, curved, semi-transparent visor with visible wear and a red Cyrillic inscription, suggesting Soviet-era origins. Prominent mechanical side arms and hinges support the visor, allowing it to be raised or lowered, and a green ribbed hose is attached to the lower front, likely for air supply. The rear of the helmet displays a red Soviet star with a hammer and sickle emblem, reinforcing its historical and military context. Metal brackets, connectors, and a black circular fitting at the back add to its utilitarian design. The helmet's surface shows signs of use, with scuffs and a matte finish, and the interior is padded for comfort and protection.
description: A vintage Soviet-style hard helmet with a large, worn visor, mechanical side arms, a green ribbed hose, and a red star emblem on the back. The surface is off-white with visible scuffs and utilitarian metal fittings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large, curved visor with Cyrillic text, green ribbed hose, and open face area.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the mechanical visor hinge, red text on the shell, and the attachment of the green hose.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the red Soviet star emblem, ribbed shell design, and the black circular fitting at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the visor hinge mechanism, white and black fittings, and the continuation of the green hose.
attribute_brand_logo: A red Soviet star with a hammer and sickle emblem is present on the back of the helmet shell.
attribute_graphic_design: Red Soviet star with hammer and sickle on the back, red Cyrillic text on the visor and shell; otherwise solid off-white with utilitarian fittings.
